item.title: 🇮🇷🇺🇸 Iran Reviews US Proposal to Halt War as Trump Says Talks Continue
item.description: Iran is reviewing a proposed agreement with the US to halt their conflict but has not communicated with Washington for days, while Trump insists negotiations are ongoing. The war has reached a stalemate after three months.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇺 Russia Launches Massive Strike on Ukraine, Kremlin Warns of New Paradigm
item.description: Russia attacked Ukraine with hundreds of drones and missiles overnight, killing at least 22 people. The Kremlin declared the war had entered a "different paradigm" due to what it called Ukrainian "terrorist acts."

item.title: ☢️🇪🇺 US Discussing Expanding Nuclear Weapons Deployments in Europe
item.description: The US is considering deploying nuclear weapons in additional European NATO states, the Financial Times reported. The discussions come as NATO allies reassess defense posture amid ongoing geopolitical tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Rubio Says No Sanctions Relief for Iran Without Nuclear Concessions
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio told Congress that the US has not offered Iran sanctions relief to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, insisting any relief would be contingent on Tehran giving up its nuclear program.

item.title: 🇱🇹🇺🇸 US Troop Presence in Lithuania Under Review as Baltic States Watch Closely
item.description: Lithuania defense minister said the future US troop presence is "under review," with Washington assuring new rotations but no clarity on timing or strength. The announcement comes amid broader questions about US commitment to European allies.

item.title: 🇬🇧🇮🇷 British couple lose Iran jail sentence appeal
item.description: Lindsay and Craig Foreman, arrested in January 2025 during a global motorbike journey, have lost their appeal against their prison sentences in Iran.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚔️ Patriot missile shortage creates window of vulnerability Russia is exploiting
item.description: A shortage of Patriot missiles has created a critical vulnerability that Russia is exploiting in Ukraine, as Kyiv asks Trump to send more missiles following deadly strikes.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU accused of creating ICE-style immigration enforcement system
item.description: European officials say a new law will improve migration management by allowing more deportations of undocumented people, drawing comparisons to US Immigration and Customs Enforcement.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Roman Gofman, Netanyahu Aide, Named New Mossad Chief in Break with Tradition
item.description: Roman Gofman's rapid rise from Netanyahu aide to Mossad director marks a significant departure from Israel's intelligence community traditions, raising questions about the agency's direction amid ongoing regional conflicts.

item.title: 💰🛡️ Israel Arms Exports Hit Record as Global Demand for Air Defense Surges
item.description: Israeli defense exports reached unprecedented levels driven by worldwide demand for air defense systems, reflecting growing security concerns among nations facing regional threats.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚔️ Zelensky Honors SBU Officers Behind Secret Spiderweb Operation Against Russia
item.description: Ukraine's Security Service (SBU) executed one of its most ambitious coordinated attacks against Russian targets, with Zelensky publicly recognizing the officers responsible for the operation.

item.title: 🕌🇹🇷 Türkiye and Eight Nations Condemn Israeli Raid on Al-Aqsa Mosque
item.description: Foreign ministers from Türkiye, UAE, Indonesia, Qatar, Egypt, Pakistan, Saudi Arabia, and Jordan issued a joint statement calling for an immediate end to Israeli incursions at the holy site.

item.title: 🇯🇵🌏 Japanese Regional Banks Exit China for Southeast Asia and India
item.description: Japan's local banks are shifting operations from China to Singapore and India, citing rising labor costs and supply chain disruptions as Chinese economic challenges mount.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Netanyahu Faces Criticism After Trump Halts Israeli Strikes on Beirut
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu is under criticism at home after President Donald Trump declared Israel would halt plans to attack Iran ally Hezbollah in Beirut, highlighting pressure the Israeli leader faces ahead of an election polls show him losing.

item.title: 🛢️ ADNOC Trading Chief Warns August Could Be Tipping Point for Oil Prices
item.description: August could mark a tipping point for much higher oil prices if demand rises and the Iran war supply crisis persists, an Abu Dhabi state oil company executive said, adding it could take a year for supply chains to recover even after flows normalize.

item.title: 💰 Vitol Executive Says Oil Market Underpricing Iran War Risks
item.description: The oil market is underpricing some risks from the Iran war, global commodity trading house Vitol managing director for Bahrain Tom Baker said on Tuesday, warning of potential supply disruptions.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump Names Bill Pulte Acting Intelligence Director to Replace Gabbard
item.description: President Donald Trump has tapped federal housing finance Director Bill Pulte to be acting director of national intelligence, replacing Tulsi Gabbard who announced she will step down on June 30.

item.title: 🇨🇦 Canada Calls for US-Mexico Free Trade Agreement Renewal for 16 Years
item.description: Canada is calling on the United States and Mexico to renew the free trade agreement between the countries for another 16 years amid ongoing trade tensions and uncertainty over US tariff policy.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Halts Mediator Communications Over Israel-Hezbollah Fighting
item.description: Iran stopped communicating with mediators after Israel threatened to bomb Beirut while continuing its campaign against Hezbollah in southern Lebanon, complicating diplomatic efforts to end the three-month-old war.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia Shows Signs of Weakness in Ukraine, Responds With Harder Strikes
item.description: Despite recent battleground losses and mounting casualties for the Kremlin, Russia has intensified its attacks on Ukrainian cities in what analysts see as an attempt to project strength amid setbacks.

item.title: 🇧🇷 US Proposes 25% Tariffs on Brazil Over Unfair Trade Practices
item.description: The Trump administration proposed 25% tariffs on Brazilian imports after an investigation found the South American country engages in unfair trade practices, escalating trade tensions with Latin America's largest economy.

item.title: ⚔️ Ceasefires Announced Across Middle East But Fighting Worsens
item.description: Despite high-profile ceasefire announcements in Gaza, Lebanon and Iran, fighting continues to intensify across multiple fronts, raising questions about the viability of diplomatic agreements in the region.

item.title: 🏍️ Desert E-Bike Race Tests Military Vehicle AI at Baja 1000
item.description: Pilot Racing team will use AI technology at the Baja 1000 desert race to test when riders should switch bikes, technology that could apply to military vehicle operations in harsh environments.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Ultra-Orthodox Mob Attacks Bereaved IDF Mother in Her Car
item.description: Ultra-Orthodox rioters attempting to overturn the vehicle of Valerie Shoshan, chief medical officer of Israel Police and mother of a fallen soldier, highlight escalating tensions over military draft exemptions.

item.title: 🇲🇾 Malaysia Demands Norway Speed Up Refund for Scrapped Missile Deal
item.description: Malaysia is pressing Norway to expedite a refund for a canceled missile purchase while exploring alternatives from Italy, France and other countries for its defense needs.
